title: lepidium peregrinum
intro: Lepidium peregrinum, also known as cress or field cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium peregrinum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Lepidium peregrinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in salads and as a garnish, to utilize its medicinal and nutritional properties.
